name: 选择器模板
description: 通过 CSS 选择器定位元素，适合已知页面结构的场景。请根据实际页面修改选择器

steps.selector: input[name='DDDDD'], input[name='username'], input[name='userId'], input[name='account'], input[name='user'], #username, #userId, input[placeholder*='账号'], input[placeholder*='学号'], input[placeholder*='用户']

steps.description: 选择运营商（下拉框 / 单选按钮 / 按钮组，无值自动跳过）
steps.script: (() => { const isp = String('{{isp}}' || '').trim(); if (!isp) return true; const vis = el => { if(!el) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); if(!s||s.display==='none'||s.visibility==='hidden') return false; const r=el.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width>1&&r.height>1; }; const norm = s => String(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,'').toLowerCase(); const want = norm(isp); const carrierKw = /移动|联通|电信|铁通|教育网|cmcc|cucc|ctcc|cernet|mobile|unicom|telecom/i; const carrierWords = /运营商|isp|carrier|套餐|网络类型|宽带|服务类型|接入方式/i; const sels = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("select[name='ISP_select'], select[name='isp'], select[name='carrier'], select[name='serviceType'], #isp, #ISP_select, select[id*='运营商']")).filter(vis); for (const sel of sels) { const opts = Array.from(sel.options||[]); let best=null, bestS=-999; for (const o of opts) { const t = norm([o.textContent,o.label,o.value].filter(Boolean).join(' ')); let s=0; if (t.includes(want)||want.includes(t)) s+=30; if (carrierKw.test(t)) s+=6; if (carrierWords.test(t)) s+=4; if (/请选择|--/.test(t)) s-=5; if (s>bestS){bestS=s;best=o;} } if (best&&bestS>=10){sel.value=best.value;sel.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));return true;} } const radios = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input[type=radio]')).filter(vis); if (radios.length >= 2) { const pool = radios.filter(r => { const label = r.labels&&r.labels[0]?r.labels[0].innerText:''; const ctx = [r.name,r.id,r.value,label].filter(Boolean).join(' '); return carrierKw.test(ctx)||carrierWords.test(ctx); }); const use = pool.length>=2 ? pool : radios; let best=null, bestS=-999; for (const r of use) { const label = r.labels&&r.labels[0]?r.labels[0].innerText:''; const t = norm([r.value,label,r.parentElement&&r.parentElement.innerText].filter(Boolean).join(' ')); let s=0; if (t.includes(want)||want.includes(t)) s+=30; if (carrierKw.test(t)) s+=6; if (s>bestS){bestS=s;best=r;} } if (best&&bestS>=5){best.click();return true;} } const clickables = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('li,label,span,div,a,button')).filter(el => { if (!vis(el)) return false; const t = norm(el.innerText); return carrierKw.test(t) && el.children.length <= 3; }); if (clickables.length >= 2) { const parent = clickables[0].parentElement; const siblings = parent ? Array.from(parent.children).filter(vis) : clickables; let best=null, bestS=-999; for (const el of siblings) { const t = norm(el.innerText); let s=0; if (t.includes(want)||want.includes(t)) s+=30; if (carrierKw.test(t)) s+=6; if (s>bestS){bestS=s;best=el;} } if (best&&bestS>=5){best.click();return true;} } return true; })()

(() => { const t = (document.body.innerText + ' ' + document.title).toLowerCase(); const fail = ['密码错误','密码不正确','账号不存在','账号或密码','认证失败','登录失败','error','failed','invalid']; for (const w of fail) { if (t.includes(w.toLowerCase())) return false; } const ok = ['登录成功','认证成功','已连接','已上线','success','connected']; if (ok.some(w => t.toLowerCase().includes(w.toLowerCase()))) return true; return false; })()
